name: emergency-vault
description: Emergency Vault — recover encrypted secrets using Shamir's Secret Sharing

scripts.deploy-pages: pnpm build && gh-pages -d dist && rm -rf dist
scripts.release: VERSION=$(grep '^version' crates/vault-cli/Cargo.toml | head -1 | sed 's/[^"]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/') && echo "Tagging v$VERSION..." && git tag -a "v$VERSION" -m "v$VERSION" && git push origin "v$VERSION"
scripts.vault:web: cp -f vault.json public/vault.json 2>/dev/null || echo 'No vault.json found — run vault encrypt first'
